headline: Cummins engine could fuel the RNG market; Biogas news from Vanguard, Opal

headline: Cummins’s (NYSE:CMI) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Engine manufacturer Cummins (NYSE:CMI) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 2.7% year on year to $8.40 billion. Its GAAP profit of $4.71 per share was 15.1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Cummins Q1 Adj. EPS $6.15 Beats $5.59 Estimate, Sales $8.398B Beat $8.352B Estimate. Adj. EPS excludes $1.44 charges related to completing the sale of our low-pressure fuel cell business.
summary: Cummins (NYSE:CMI) reported quarterly earnings of $6.15 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $5.59 by 10.02 percent. This is a 3.19 percent increase over earnings of $5.96 per share from the same period
